name: Wand of Smoldering Fireballs (7th-Rank Spell)
description:
This blackened, heavily burned stick smells faintly of saltpeter.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Fireball at 7th-rank. Each creature that fails its save takes 3d6 persistent fire damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of fireball at 7th-rank.
